messages.content: Generate valid JSON only for BlueLearnerHub quizzes.
Generate 2 beginner multiple-choice questions about JavaScript variables.

[{"question":"Which keyword declares a block-scoped variable in JavaScript?","options":{"A":"var","B":"let","C":"define","D":"set"},"correct_answer":"B","explanation":"let declares a variable scoped to the nearest block.","difficulty":"beginner","estimated_seconds":45},{"question":"What happens when a const variable is reassigned?","options":{"A":"The value changes","B":"It becomes undefined","C":"JavaScript throws an error","D":"It is converted to let"},"correct_answer":"C","explanation":"const prevents reassignment after initialization.","difficulty":"beginner","estimated_seconds":45}]
Generate valid JSON only for BlueLearnerHub quizzes.
Generate 1 intermediate question about binary search.

[{"question":"Why does binary search require sorted input?","options":{"A":"Sorting reduces memory usage","B":"It compares against a middle value and discards half based on order","C":"It only works on arrays of numbers","D":"It needs duplicate values"},"correct_answer":"B","explanation":"Binary search depends on ordering to know which half cannot contain the target.","difficulty":"intermediate","estimated_seconds":60}]
